title: Deployment Readiness Failure Analysis
headline: Compact single-call analysis for startup and rollback discussions.
description: Runs the lightweight analysis path on a rollout failure log so you can show the fast incident summary route before moving into deeper workflows.

request_body.log_text:
2026-03-31 18:45:01 INFO rollout started for payments-api build 2026.03.31.4
2026-03-31 18:45:09 ERROR readiness probe failed with connection refused on port 8080
2026-03-31 18:45:14 ERROR missing required environment variable STRIPE_SIGNING_SECRET
2026-03-31 18:45:17 WARN deployment controller paused rollout after consecutive failures

notes: Use this to explain the fast, lower-friction route for triage before deeper investigation.
It demonstrates that SentinelOps can distinguish deployment failures caused by missing configuration.

operator_steps: Review the structured response and manager-friendly summary.
Use it as the before-state for why /investigate and /workflow add more evidence.
